verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: When the falling falls
– at its falling there will be no calling (it) a lie –
bringing low, raising high,
when the earth is violently shaken,
and the mountains utterly crumble,
and become scattered dust,
and you become three classes:
the companions on the right – what are the companions on the right?
And the companions on the left – what are the companions on the left?
And the foremost. The foremost
– those are the ones brought near,
in Gardens of Bliss –
a host from the ones of old,
but few from the later (generations) –
on well-woven couches,
reclining on them, facing each other.
Boys of eternal youth will circulate among them,
with cups and pitchers, and a cup from a flowing spring
– they do not suffer any headache from it, nor do they become drunk –

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزَفُونَ
canonical_variants.english: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

verses.text: and with fruit of their own choosing,
and the meat of birds of their own desiring,
and (maidens) with dark, wide eyes
like hidden pearls
– a reward for what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
verses.text: There they will not hear any frivolous or sinful talk,
only the saying, ‘Peace! Peace!’
The companions on the right – what are the companions of the right?
(They will be) in (the midst of) thornless lote trees,
and acacia trees one after another,
and extensive shade,
and flowing water,
and many fruits
– unlimited, unforbidden –
and raised couches.
Surely We produced them specially,
and made them virgins,
amorous, (all) of the same age,
for the companions on the right.
A host from the ones of old,
and a host from the later (generations).
The companions on the left – what are the companions on the left?
(They will be) in (the midst of) scorching (fire) and boiling (water),
and a shadow of black smoke,
neither cool nor kind.
Surely before (this) they were affluent,
and persisted in the great refusal,

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: and used to say, ‘When we are dead, and turned to dust and bones, shall we indeed be raised up?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَٰئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً إِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
canonical_variants.english: “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً اِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
canonical_variants.english: “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?

verses.text: And our fathers of old (too)?’

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوْ ءَابَآؤُنَا اَ۬لْأَوَّلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or our ancient forefathers, too?”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا اَ۬لَاوَّلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And our ancient forefathers, too?”

verses.text: Say: ‘Surely those of old and the later (generations)
will indeed be gathered to the meeting of a known Day.
Then surely you – you who have gone astray and called (it) a lie! –
will indeed eat from the tree of Zaqqūm,
and fill your bellies from it,
and drink on (top of) it from boiling water,
drinking like the thirsty (camel) drinks.’
This will be their reception on the Day of Judgment.
We created you. Why will you not affirm (it)?
Do you see what you emit?
Do you create it, or are We the Creators?

verses.quran_arabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.text: We have decreed death (to be) among you – We are not (to be) outrun –

verses.quran_arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: so that We may exchange the likes of you, and (re)produce you in what you do not know.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Certainly you have known the first growth. Why will you not take heed?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشَآءَةَ اَ۬لۡأُولۭيٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ  عَلِمۡتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشَآءَةَ اَ۬لۡأُولۭيٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would remind yourselves!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشَآءَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشَآءَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشْأَةَ اَ۬لْأُولَىٰۖ فَلَوْلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشْأَةَ اَ۬لُاول۪ىٰۖ فَلَوْلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!

verses.text: Do you see what you cultivate?
Do you (yourselves) sow it, or are We the Sowers?

verses.quran_arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَٰهُ حُطَٰمًۭا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
verses.text: If We (so) pleased, We could indeed make it broken debris, and you would be left rejoicing,
‘Surely we have incurred debt indeed!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَءِنَّا لَمُغۡرَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: “Can it be that we will really be in debt?

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا لَمُغۡرَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: “Indeed, we are in debt;

verses.text: No! We have been robbed!’
Do you see the water which you drink?

verses.quran_arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
verses.text: Do you send it down from the clouds, or are We the Ones who send (it) down?

verses.quran_arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَٰهُ أُجَاجًۭا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: If We (so) pleased, We could make it bitter. Why are you not thankful?
Do you see the fire which you ignite?

verses.quran_arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.text: Do you produce the timber for it, or are We the Ones who produce (it)?
We have made it a reminder and a provision for the desert dwellers.
So glorify the name of your Lord, the Almighty.
I swear by the fallings of the stars
– surely it is a great oath indeed, if (only) you knew –
surely it is an honorable Qur’ān indeed,
in a hidden Book!
No one touches it but the purified.
(It is) a sending down from the Lord of the worlds.
Do you hold this proclamation in disdain,
and do you make it your living to call (it) a lie?
Why not, when the life of the dying man leaps into his throat,
and you are looking on

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: – though We are nearer to him than you, only you do not see (Us) –
why, if you are not (to be) judged,
do you not return it, if you are truthful?
If he is one of those brought near,
(there will be) comfort, and fragrance, and a Garden of Bliss.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: And if he is one of the companions on the right:
‘Peace (be) to you, from the companions on the right!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: But if he is one of those who called (it) a lie (and) went astray,
(there will be) a reception of boiling (water)
and burning in a Furnace.
Surely this – it indeed is the certain truth.
So glorify the name of your Lord, the Almighty.
